holdings.infoBox: GVLU is an equity ETF with a total of 475 individual holdings. The top holdings are TD SYNNEX stock at 0.55%, TFI International at 0.50%, Mercury General at 0.49%, Crocs at 0.48%, and BrightSpring Health Services at 0.48%.

overview.description: The Gotham 1000 Value ETF (GVLU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF consisting of large- and mid-cap value stocks from the United States. GVLU was launched on Jun 7, 2022 and is issued by Tidal.
